version_description: This is how I play the song in my shot, I think it sounds good in Double Drop D tuning.
tuning: D A D G B E
content:
Tuning: Double Drop D DADGBD

[Intro]

B|------3-3-------3-------3----|
G|----2---------2-------2------|
D|--0---------0----------------| x3

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.        [ch]D[/ch]
This ain't Texas (woo), ain't no hold 'em (hey)[/tab]

So lay your cards down, down, down, down
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
So park your Lexus (woo) and throw your keys up (hey)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Stick around, 'round, 'round, 'round, 'round (stick around)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll be damned if I can't slow dance with you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Come pour some sugar on me, honey too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a real life boogie and a real life hoedown[/tab]
D* N.C.
Don't be a bitch, come take it to the floor now, woo, huh (woo)

[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Rugged whiskey (rugged whiskey) 'cause we survivin' ('cause we survivin')[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
Off red cup kisses, sweet redemption, passin' time, yeah[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
